title: Move pulses to top or bottom, or any position

posts.author: Bjorn (Björn Eriksson)
posts.cookedHtml:
When moving pulses from on group to another I would like to have the possibility to say “Move to top” or “Move to bottom”. Or to any given position.

This goes both when moving one pulse, or several at at time.

Look at Trello (sorry ), the have this feature, it is very useful.

posts.author: btaylor76 (Ben P Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
I definitely agree with this. We want all of our oldest tickets at the top as they are the priority tickets and the priority is always top to bottom. So every time we move items from one sprint to another the oldest go to the bottom and we have to move them.

I would also add to this request and say multi select drag and drop would be a huge feature.

posts.author: Bjorn (Björn Eriksson)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, multi select drag and drop is worth a feature request of it´s own.
